title: Software Developer
summary: Building full-stack and AI-driven features using Python, Node.js, and modern JavaScript frameworks.
responsibilities: Develop scalable backend services and REST APIs with Python and Node.js.
Integrate MySQL-backed services and maintain production-ready data workflows.
Build responsive interfaces with React, Tailwind CSS, and Remix.
Use Docker-based workflows to streamline development and deployment.

title: MERN Full-Stack Web Developer
summary: Deliver full-stack web applications with the MERN stack for client projects.
responsibilities: Build and deploy end-to-end features across MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js.
Design responsive frontends with reusable components and Redux-based state management.
Create and maintain REST APIs for product and user flows.
Optimize app performance and scalability for production workloads.

title: Computer Science Teacher
summary: Teach computer science and digital literacy to students new to computers.
responsibilities: Explain foundational computer concepts in simple, practical lessons.
Design class exercises that improve confidence with digital tools.
Support students in understanding core CS problem-solving approaches.

title: Computer Fundamentals Instructor
summary: Provide instruction in computer fundamentals and advanced concepts.
responsibilities: Prepare structured sessions from basics to advanced computer topics.
Mentor learners with different starting skill levels.
Track learner progress and adapt teaching material for clarity.

title: Logistics Clerk
summary: Managed records and logistics data entry operations for inventory handling.
responsibilities: Maintain accurate logistics registers and daily inventory records.
Coordinate data updates for stock movement and storage operations.
Ensure record consistency to support reliable logistics reporting.
